name: CARPAL TUNNEL SYNDROME
definition: entrapment syndrome caused by chronic pressure on the median nerve within the carpal tunnel
dominant_finding: swelling of nerve within carpal tunnel
discriminating_features: "pseudoneuroma" of median nerve = swelling of median nerve proximal to carpal tunnel
swelling of nerve within carpal tunnel
increased signal intensity of nerve on T2WI

MR: "pseudoneuroma" of median nerve = swelling of median nerve proximal to carpal tunnel
swelling of nerve within carpal tunnel
increased signal intensity of nerve on T2WI
marked enhancement ← nerve edema ← breakdown of blood-nerve barrier
no enhancement (= ischemia) provoked by wrist held in an extended / flexed position
